account_opening.eligibility: Any Indian resident aged 18 or above with a valid government-issued ID can open an account.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card or PAN Card for KYC
account_opening.minimum_balance: No minimum balance required. ADX Bank is a zero-balance account bank.
account_opening.activation: Account is activated only after successful email OTP verification.
account_opening.joining_bonus: Every new account holder receives a ₹500 joining bonus credited immediately upon activation.

kyc.kyc_process: KYC is done during registration via Aadhaar-based verification. Pending KYC users are restricted from high-value operations.
kyc.re_kyc: Re-KYC is required every 2 years for active accounts.

account_status.active: Account is operational and all transactions are permitted.
account_status.inactive: Account registered but email not verified. No transactions allowed.
account_status.dormant: Account with no transactions for 12 consecutive months. Contact support to reactivate.
account_status.blocked: Account blocked due to suspicious activity or policy violation. Contact branch.

salary_credit.policy: Users who declare their salary during registration receive an automatic monthly salary credit 2 minutes after account activation (demo feature).
salary_credit.no_salary: If no salary is declared, no automatic credit is applied.

account_closure.process: Submit a closure request via the branch or customer care. All outstanding loans must be cleared before closure.
account_closure.cooling_period: Account closure requests are processed within 7 working days.
account_closure.final_settlement: Remaining balance is transferred to the linked bank account provided by the customer.
